title: Section 23
content: 1[23. Grant of medical degrees, diplomas, etc., by Institute.--Notwithstanding anything contained in any other law for the time being in force, the Institute shall have power to grant medical degrees, diplomas and other academic distinctions and titles under this Act.
footnote: 1. Section 23 shall stand substituted (date to be notified) by Act 3 of 2009, s. 2 to read as under: "23. Grant of medical, dental or nursing degrees, diplomas, etc., by the institute.-- Notwithstanding anything contained in any other law for the time being in force, the Institute shall have power to grant medical, dental or nursing degrees, diplomas and other academic distinctions and titles under this Act.".
